---
name: Feature Request / 기능 요청
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary / 요약
<!-- Briefly describe the feature -->
<!-- 기능을 간략히 설명해주세요 -->

## Motivation / 배경
<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? -->
<!-- 왜 필요한가요? 어떤 문제를 해결하나요? -->

## Proposed Implementation / 구현 방안
<!-- How do you think this should be implemented? -->
<!-- 어떻게 구현하면 좋을지 설명해주세요 -->

## Affected Components / 관련 컴포넌트
- [ ] 8141-geth
- [ ] solidity-eip8141
- [ ] viem-eip8141
- [ ] contracts
- [ ] devnet
- [ ] docs

## Additional Context / 추가 정보
<!-- Any other context, references, or EIP specs -->
<!-- 참고 자료, EIP 스펙 등 -->
